name: Easy Chicken Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, green bell pepper, and garlic in oil until tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Add flour and stir just until the flour starts to brown.
3. Stir in tomato paste, broth, salt, sugar, and Tabasco sauce.
4. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
5. Stir in cooked, cubed chicken and black pepper.
6. Simmer uncovered for 5 minutes or until the chicken is heated through.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
